page: Microsoft Azure NV6s_v2 is an x86_64 architecture virtual machine belonging to the NVSv2 server family. Powered by dedicated Intel processors and managed via the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor, this instance features 6 vCPUs and a substantial memory allocation of 112.0 GB, yielding approximately 18.67 GB of RAM per core.

The hardware configuration includes a fractional GPU allocation of 0.5 physical GPU, designed to support accelerated workloads without requiring a full dedicated card. For local data storage, the server is equipped with 754 GB of local storage and is designated as Premium Storage capable, allowing integration with high-performance storage options.

Given the high memory-to-vCPU ratio and the inclusion of a fractional GPU, the NV6s_v2 offers a balanced resource density for workloads requiring moderate graphical acceleration and significant memory capacity. It is suited for database hosting, memory-intensive applications, and entry-level GPU-accelerated tasks such as visualization or light machine learning inference.
description: Microsoft Azure NV6s_v2 is an x86_64 virtual machine within the NVSv2 family, running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor with dedicated Intel processors. It features 6 vCPUs and 112.0 GB of memory, providing a high memory-to-core ratio of 18.67 GB per vCPU. The instance is equipped with a fractional GPU allocation of 0.5 and includes 754 GB of local storage with Premium Storage capability. This hardware profile makes the NV6s_v2 highly suitable for memory-intensive workloads, database management, and entry-level GPU-accelerated applications that benefit from hardware acceleration without the cost of a full dedicated GPU.

tagline: A memory-rich virtual machine featuring fractional GPU acceleration and high-capacity local storage for specialized database and visualization workloads.
